entry.title: Lissy93 contributed to atas2390/arnon
entry.content:
Lissy93 merged atas2390/arnon#4 · March 14, 2026 08:26
Fixes some found vulnerabilities, and implements some security hardening #4

Summary

Eeach fix is in a seperate commit, in case you wanted to cherry-pick.
This PR is in relation to the review done for awesoeme-privacy in Lis…

entry.title: Lissy93 pushed arnon
entry.content:
Lissy93 pushed to main in Lissy93/arnon · March 14, 2026 15:08
2 commits to main
  • 1f9dd2d
    fix: XSS, rate-limit bypass, extractable keys, memory leak, missing CSP

    docs: update line count to 489, add Dockerfile and CSP to README
